originalTitle: The whole Pixel line could get more expensive this year
summary: Google's upcoming Pixel lineup might cost more than last year's. A report from Dealabs spotted by 9to5Google suggests that Google could raise the starting price of its 41mm Pixel Watch 5 to $399, while adding LTE could bump the price to $499. That's a $50 jump from the base Pixel Watch 4, which starts at […]
content: Google’s upcoming Pixel lineup might cost more than last year’s. A report from Dealabs spotted by 9to5Google suggests that Google could raise the starting price of its 41mm Pixel Watch 5 to $399, while adding LTE could bump the price to $499. That’s a $50 jump from the base Pixel Watch 4, which starts at $349 for Wi-Fi and $449 for LTE. Meanwhile, the larger 45mm Pixel Watch 5 is rumored to cost $429 with Wi-Fi only, or $529 with LTE, marking a $30 increase from the previous generation. A separate report from Dealabs details the potential European pricing for the Pixel 11. The report suggests that Google could drop the lowest 128GB storage configuration option for the Pixel 11, raising the device’s starting price to €999 with 256GB of storage, while the Pixel 11 Pro could start at €1,199. Last year’s base Pixel 10 model cost €899 with 128GB of storage, while the Pixel 10 Pro started at €1,099. Although the starting price of both devices may increase, the price of the 256GB configuration is rumored to remain the same. The Pixel 11 Pro XL and Pixel 11 Pro Fold may get a €100 increase across the board, putting their starting prices at €1,399 and €1,999, respectively, according to Dealabs. These potential price increases shouldn’t come as a surprise, as device makers across industries are contending with a global memory and storage shortage due to increased demand from AI companies. Several companies have already raised the prices of their devices or axed certain memory or storage variations. A previous rumor suggested that the Pixel 11 could start with 8GB of RAM instead of last year’s 12GB as a result of the shortage. Google will take the wraps off its new Pixel devices at a launch event on August 12th.
chineseTitle: 今年整个 Pixel 系列可能会变得更贵
chineseSummary: 谷歌即将推出的 Pixel 系列产品的价格可能会比去年更高。 9to5Google 发现的 Dealabs 的一份报告显示，谷歌可能会将 41 毫米 Pixel Watch 5 的起价提高到 399 美元，而添加 LTE 可能会将价格提高到 499 美元。这比基础版 Pixel Watch 4 上涨了 50 美元，起价为 [...]
chineseContent: 谷歌即将推出的 Pixel 系列产品的价格可能会比去年更高。 9to5Google 发现的 Dealabs 的一份报告显示，谷歌可能会将 41 毫米 Pixel Watch 5 的起价提高到 399 美元，而添加 LTE 可能会将价格提高到 499 美元。这比基础款 Pixel Watch 4 上涨了 50 美元，后者 Wi-Fi 起价为 349 美元，LTE 起价为 449 美元。与此同时，据传更大的 45 毫米 Pixel Watch 5 仅支持 Wi-Fi 的售价为 429 美元，支持 LTE 的售价为 529 美元，比上一代价格上涨了 30 美元。 Dealabs 的另一份报告详细介绍了 Pixel 11 在欧洲的潜在定价。该报告表明，谷歌可能会放弃 Pixel 11 最低的 128GB 存储配置选项，将该设备的起价提高到 999 欧元（256GB 存储），而 Pixel 11 Pro 的起价可能为 1,199 欧元。去年具有 128GB 存储空间的 Pixel 10 基础型号售价为 899 欧元，而 Pixel 10 Pro 起售价为 1,099 欧元。尽管两款设备的起售价可能会上涨，但据传 256GB 配置的价格将保持不变。据 Dealabs 称，Pixel 11 Pro XL 和 Pixel 11 Pro Fold 可能会全面上涨 100 欧元，起价分别为 1,399 欧元和 1,999 欧元。这些潜在的价格上涨不应令人意外，因为各行业的设备制造商正在应对由于人工智能公司需求增加而导致的全球内存和存储短缺问题。几家公司已经提高了其设备的价格或削减了某些内存或存储版本。之前有传言称，由于短缺，Pixel 11 可能会配备 8GB 内存，而不是去年的 12GB。谷歌将在 8 月 12 日的发布会上揭晓其新款 Pixel 设备。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
